goal: Keep the two remaining product destinations immediately available in a calm one-row header on desktop and mobile.

regions.purpose: Product identity and conventional home anchor
Direct access to Canvas and Songs with current-route orientation

secondary_actions: Return home through the brand anchor

interaction_rules: Keep Canvas and Songs visible at every supported width
Use semantic links and aria-current for the active route
Do not require a menu expansion for two destinations
Use visible focus rings and motion-reduced transitions
aesthetic_rules: Semantic background, foreground, muted, border, and ring tokens
One restrained active-route line instead of filled navigation pills
No shadows, gradients, badges, or decorative containers
